name: Funding Pips
description_short: Dubai-based prop firm offering 2-step, 1-step, and instant funding programs with up to 100% profit splits and $200M+ in total payouts.
description_long:
Funding Pips is a proprietary trading firm founded in August 2022 and headquartered in Dubai, UAE under the legal entity Ankh Prop – FZCO. Despite being relatively new to the prop firm space, the company has grown rapidly, claiming over 2 million registered traders and $200M+ in total payouts. Its diverse program lineup — 2-Step Standard, 2-Step Pro, 1-Step, and Zero (Instant Funding) — gives traders flexibility based on their risk tolerance and trading style.

Challenge fees start at just $29 for the 2-Step Pro $5K account, making Funding Pips accessible to newer traders. The standout feature is its profit-split structure: traders can earn anywhere from 60% up to 100% depending on the payout frequency they choose. The Zero (Instant Funding) program offers a 95% split with no profit target required, appealing to experienced traders who want to skip evaluation phases.

Funding Pips supports MetaTrader 5, cTrader, and Match Trader across desktop, web, and mobile. MT5 was re-added in March 2025 after a hiatus, and cTrader carries a $20 surcharge. Tradeable instruments include forex, indices, metals, energies, and crypto (~48 instruments total), though individual stocks, options, and futures are not available.

The affiliate program is automatically activated upon purchasing any challenge, offering up to 10% commission on referrals plus a unique 5% discount code for referred traders. With a 4.5/5 Trustpilot rating from over 43,000 reviews, Funding Pips has built a strong reputation for fast payouts and transparent rules, though its limited instrument count and platform surcharges are minor drawbacks.
pros: Competitive entry pricing starting at $29 for a $5K challenge
Flexible profit splits up to 100% with multiple payout frequencies
Strong 4.5/5 Trustpilot rating from 43,000+ verified reviews
Zero (Instant Funding) program skips evaluation with 95% split
Automatic affiliate program with up to 10% commission
cons: No individual stocks, options, or futures available (~48 instruments only)
No standalone mobile app — relies on third-party platform mobile clients
Mid-tier pricing not fully transparent without promotional discounts
headquarters: IFZA Business Park, DDP, Dubai, UAE
